  raw banner snapshot has 6 CR bytes, but the   committed version has 0 — autocrlf stripped   themduringstaging.Therawfixturesalready
  lost their CR sequences before the warning    
  eventoldus.Weneedtofix.gitattributes
  and re-stage the bytes.
Letmeexecutetheamendcleanly:refresh
  fixtures from current /tmp (which has newer   
  but representatively-shaped captures), add    
  .gitattributes, then amend.

 1  *.xmlui linguist-language=XML
 2  *.xmlui linguist-detectable=true             3 +                                             4 +# Windows ConPTY raw byte captures must pres   +erve every CR for the                        5 +# strip_ansi tests they back. `binary` disab   +les CRLF normalization                       6 +# and textual diff on these files.           7 +src-tauri/tests/fixtures/windows-conpty/* bi   +nary
